arts.ttl: Udinese’s Runjaic: “Sanchez against Inter? He could even start”
arts.sum: Udinese coach Kosta Runjaic addressed the media during the club’s Christmas toast, discussing his team’s journey so far and focusing on tomorrow night’s Coppa Italia round of 16 match against Inter. The manager indicated that he doesn’t intend to make too many changes to the lineup, but hinted at a possible surprise in the starting eleven. Reflecting on the team’s progress, Runjaic stated, “Difficult and winding roads often lead us to important results, the best is yet to come.
